content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Petya and Divisors". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/111/B
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n.
content.outputFormat: Print the number of divisors of n.

solution.approach: Iterate through all numbers from 1 to sqrt(n) and count the divisors.
